title: What is Jewish Theology?
further_info: Recommended Reading - Saadya Gaon, The Book of Doctrines and Beliefs, Hackett, 2002. - Maimonides, Moses. 1963. The Guide of the Perplexed. Translated with introduction and notes by Shlomo Pines; introductory essay by Leo Strauss. Chicago: University of Chicago Press. - Wolfson, Harry A. 1967. “The Jewish Kalam.” The Jewish Quarterly Review 57: 544–573. Ben-Shammai, Haggai. “Kalām in Medieval Jewish Philosophy.” In History of Jewish Philosophy, edited by Daniel H. Frank and Oliver Leaman, 91–117. London and New York: Routledge, 1997. Für die Verwendbarkeit des Kurses in den verschiedenen Studiengängen beachten Sie bitte die Angaben unter "Modul / Verwendbarkeit in Studiengang" im Kommentierten Vorlesungsverzeichnis (KVV) der HfJS.
